tests.test_manure_module.test_manure_manager module

tests.test_manure_module.test_manure_manager.test_manure_manager_init(mocker: MockerFixture, simulate_animals: bool, log_added: bool) → None

Unit test for __init__() of ManureManager in manure_manager.py

tests.test_manure_module.test_manure_manager.test_configure_manure_manager_components(manure_separator: str, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Unit test for configure_manure_manager_components() in manure_manager.py

tests.test_manure_module.test_manure_manager.test_is_compound_anaerobic_manure_treatment(manure_treatment_name: str, is_compound_anaerobic_treatment: bool) → None

Unit test for _is_compound_anaerobic_manure_treatment() in manure_manager.py.

tests.test_manure_module.test_manure_manager.test_handle_daily_update_for_simple_manure_treatment(is_manure_separator_present: bool, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Unit test for _handle_daily_update_for_simple_manure_treatment() in manure_manager.py.

This test checks the daily update functionality of a simple manure treatment process with and without a manure separator. It verifies that the method correctly interacts with the manure separator (if present), the manure handler, and the manure treatment, returning appropriate daily outputs and accumulated output for the treatment.

tests.test_manure_module.test_manure_manager.test_handle_update_for_compound_anaerobic_manure_treatment(mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Unit test for _handle_daily_update_for_compound_anaerobic_manure_treatment() in manure_manager.py.

This test verifies the daily update functionality for a compound anaerobic manure treatment process. It checks for the returned daily and accumulated outputs from the anaerobic digestion process, manure separator, and overall manure treatment.

tests.test_manure_module.test_manure_manager.test_pen_daily_update_for_separator_and_treatment(is_compound_anaerobic_manure_treatment: bool, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Unit test for _pen_daily_update_for_separator_and_treatment() in manure_manager.py.

This test checks whether the daily updates for the manure separator and treatment are correctly executed depending on the manure treatment type (compound anaerobic or simple). It verifies the correct execution of either ‘_handle_daily_update_for_compound_anaerobic_manure_treatment’ or ‘_handle_daily_update_for_simple_manure_treatment’, based on the manure treatment type.

tests.test_manure_module.test_manure_manager.test_pen_daily_update(mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Unit test for the _pen_daily_update() method in ManureManager class found in manure_manager.py.

This test verifies that the _pen_daily_update() method correctly performs the daily updates for a given pen. Specifically, it checks that the method creates a ManureManagerPen instance, calls the daily_update() method on manure_handler and reception_pit, and calls the _pen_daily_update_for_separator_and_treatment() method.

tests.test_manure_module.test_manure_manager.test_manure_manager_daily_update(mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Unit test for the daily_update() method in ManureManager class found in manure_manager.py.

This test verifies that the daily_update() method correctly performs the daily updates for all pens by calling the _pen_daily_update() method for each pen returned by the AnimalManager.

tests.test_manure_module.test_manure_manager.test_get_manure_type(treatment_type: ManureTreatmentType, expected_manure_type: ManureType) → None

Unit test for the _get_manure_type method of the ManureManager class in manure_manager.py.

This test checks whether the _get_manure_type method returns the correct ManureType for the provided ManureTreatmentType.

tests.test_manure_module.test_manure_manager.test_get_manure_density_by_type(manure_type: ManureType, expected_density: float) → None

Unit test for _get_manure_density_by_type() method in the ManureManager class.

tests.test_manure_module.test_manure_manager.test_add_manure_nutrients(mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Unit test for the _add_manure_nutrients method of the ManureManager class in manure_manager.py.

This test checks whether the _add_manure_nutrients method adds the correct amount of nutrients to the ManureNutrientManager for a mock pen with the provided ManureTreatmentType.

tests.test_manure_module.test_manure_manager.test_request_nutrients(mocker: MockerFixture, animals_simulated: bool, use_supplemental_manure: bool) → None

Unit test for the updated request_nutrients method of the ManureManager class.

tests.test_manure_module.test_manure_manager.test_record_manure_request_results_parametrized(mocker: MockerFixture, manure_request_results, expected_request_result_values, expected_log_called) → None

Parametrized unit test for the _record_manure_request_results method of the ManureManager class.

tests.test_manure_module.test_manure_manager.test_calculate_supplemental_manure_needed(on_farm_manure: NutrientRequestResults, nutrient_request: NutrientRequest, expected_result: NutrientRequest, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Unit test for the _calculate_supplemental_manure_needed static method.
